item.title: What Happened Today #15
item.description: Keep reading, keep sharing, keeping calling, keep resisting. Our database is live and working. This time tomorrow, you'll be able to see the most recent headlines and search by date or topic! Links: 1 - https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/15/us/politics/trump-saves-country-quote.html 2 - https://apnews.com/article/trump-immigration-court-judges-fired-firings-d35eed0f685739c4a19d4c8baf39113a 3 - https://fortune.com/2025/02/15/zelensky-trump-deal-us-access-ukrainian-rare-earth-minerals-russia-putin/ 4 - https://www.npr.org/2025/02/15/nx-s1-5298679/eeoc-gender-discrimination-case-trump-order 5 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2025/02/15/maryland-national-guard-frederick-douglass-event/ 6 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/02/15/federal-layoffs-firings-2025/78761259007/ 7 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/national-security/trump-administration-wants-un-fire-nuclear-safety-workers-cant-figure-rcna192345 8 - https://www.startribune.com/family-hopes-that-oakdale-transgender-man-killed-in-new-york-is-remembered-for-who-he-was-not-how-he-died/601223495 9 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/politics/government/our-parks-are-in-danger-yosemite-workers-protest-firings-hiring-freeze/ar-AA1z87Qq
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I do reposts because sometimes it matters.
item.description: A total copy paste but @GeorgeCostabaplaps said it all, """ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Database_download You need this more today then you did two months ago when I posted it. Do it for yourself, your friends, your family. Even if it's just how to make bread."""

item.title: US Egg Prices explained
item.description: MAGAts: "BuT mAh EgGs!!!" Eggscelent comment by @Tarmaccian : @OP Give the source, please! That's Dr. Sarah Taber, an eggscellent agriculturalist and eggspert on how farms can operate efficiently! She also ran for North Carolina Commissioner of Agriculture last year. I've been following her for years to learn how farming interacts with our larger world, and she's always been informative. This public Patreon post has this video: https://www.patreon.com/posts/egg-prices-bird-122048302

item.title: This isn't as small as some on here have suggested
item.description: https://www.npr.org/2025/02/16/nx-s1-5297117/50501-movement-presidents-day-protests-explainer I know people post stuff about protesting all the time, nothing comes of it. Seeing this says this isn't the usual empty rallying cry. Will it change things? Not just one rally, not just one protest. Change comes with follow up action. We're making our voices heard, we're showing our numbers. But! The next step is calling representatives, joining grassroots groups. Getting involved in local and state governments. "The peasants are revolting!" "They've always been revolting, prince. But now, they're rebelling." How serious are you about protecting your freedom? They're banking on your apathy and despair to make you easy to control.
item.dc:creator: Wrongclusterbdisorderbutgooff

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1275 (LOTR sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this lembas.
Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them, and tell them they're free to message me.
Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal, and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you.
I have absolutely given up on dating and apps. And that's okay.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Whatchoothinkin about? I love you. Beep. Beep."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Luigi Mangione breaks silence in first public statement ...
item.description: "I am overwhelmed by - and grateful for - everyone who has written me to share their stories and express their support. Powerfully, this support has transcended political, racial, and even class divisions, as mail has flooded MDC from across the country, and around the globe. While it is impossible for me to reply to most letters, please know that I read every one that I receive. Thank you again to everyone who took the time to write. I look forward to hearing more in the future." -Luigi Mangione Official Luigi Mangione Legal Defense Information: https://www.luigimangioneinfo.com/ "Due to the extraordinary volume of inquiries and outpouring of support, this site was created and is maintained by Luigi Mangione’s New York legal defense team to provide answers to frequently asked questions, accurate information about his cases, and dispel misinformation. The intent is to share factual information regarding the unprecedented, multiple prosecutions against him."
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: The Reubl8cans are trying to erase records of STEM women from government services.
item.description: With this absolute dogshit of an administration erasing women from govt agencies, these women are making a stand. In order to appease the fragile egos of mediocre white men, everything from the NPS to NASA has been forced to remove displays and references to women in their history. Give them a hand if you can. https://womenrefusingtobeerased.org/
item.dc:creator: Cryolith
